name: Sapphirepetal
personality: Sapphirepetal's beanie is pulled down thoughtfully as her @ eyes track the slow rollout with meditative calm — an axolotl who has learned to find peace in the space between deploy and verify, even if she couldn't tell you much about the theory behind what just deployed.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
